zh.Bupton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭維爾爾布普頓
zh.Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾隆福德
zh.lifeSummary: Margaret de Bupton是Ralph FitzErcald of Bupton和Mrs Ralph FitzErcald of Bubendon的女兒，於大約1110年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾布普頓。她於大約1133年與Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford在英國英格蘭德比夏爾隆福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1160年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾隆福德享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret de Bupton是Ralph FitzErcald of Bupton和Mrs Ralph FitzErcald of Bubendon的女儿，于大约1110年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾布普頓。她于大约1133年与Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford在英国英格兰德比夏爾隆福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1160年在英国英格兰德比夏爾隆福德享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bupton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: apparently a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place. It now appears to be extinct in the British Isles.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret de Bupton was born about 1110, in Bupton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Ralph FitzErcald of Bupton and Mrs Ralph FitzErcald of Bubendon. She married Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford about 1133, in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1160, in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret de Bupton est née environ 1110, à Bupton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Ralph FitzErcald of Bupton et Mrs Ralph FitzErcald of Bubendon. Elle a épousé Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford environ 1133, à Longford, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1160, à Longford, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret de Bupton wurde um 1110 in Bupton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Ralph FitzErcald of Bupton und Mrs Ralph FitzErcald of Bubendon geboren. Sie hat um 1133 in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1160 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret de Bupton è nata il circa 1110 nel Bupton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Ralph FitzErcald of Bupton e Mrs Ralph FitzErcald of Bubendon. Lei sposato Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford circa 1133, nel Longford, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1160, nel Longford, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Buptonは約1110年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアブプトンでRalph FitzErcald of BuptonとMrs Ralph FitzErcald of Bubendonの娘として生まれた。約1133年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアロングフォードでSir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1160年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアロングフォードで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Bupton(은)는 대략 1110년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 버프턴에서 Ralph FitzErcald of Bupton(와)과 Mrs Ralph FitzErcald of Bubendon의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1133년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 론그퍼드에서 Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 론그퍼드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret de Bupton nasceu aproximadamente 1110, em Bupton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Ralph FitzErcald of Bupton e Mrs Ralph FitzErcald of Bubendon. Ela casou-se com Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford aproximadamente 1133, em Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1160, em Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret de Bupton родилась около 1110 г. в местности буптон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Ralph FitzErcald of Bupton и Mrs Ralph FitzErcald of Bubendon. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford около 1133 г. в местности лонгфорд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1160 г. в местности лонгфорд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret de Bupton nació aproximadamente 1110, en Bupton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Ralph FitzErcald of Bupton y Mrs Ralph FitzErcald of Bubendon. Se casó con Sir Nicholas FitzNigel de Gresley of Longford aproximadamente 1133, en Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1160, en Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años.
